labels.analysis: The MCP Server "com.getcims/mcp" provides 2 tools focused on social media tasks. Core capabilities include search and retrieval. Key tools: get_creators, get_creator.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Social Media" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: social, follower, instagram, tiktok, youtube.

tools.name: get_creators
tools.description: Searches for social media creators by name, handle, or platform. Uses the discovery service to find creators.

skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination. Default: 0.

identityType.description: Platform. Repeat query parameter to pass multiple values.

gender.description: Gender filter. Supports numeric values (1=female, 2=male, 3=other) or string values ('female', 'male', 'other'). Uses NumberValue format: >=, <=, >, <, = operators (e.g. '1', 'female').

language.description: Language codes to filter by. Plain string values (e.g. 'en', 'sv').

lookalike.description: Lookalike profile names to filter by. Plain string values.

follower.description: Follower count filter using NumberValue format. Supports operators: >=N, <=N, >N, <N, N (equals), or range MIN-MAX (e.g. '>=10000', '<=100000', '>5000').

engagement.description: Engagement count filter using NumberValue format. Supports operators: >=N, <=N, >N, <N, N (equals), or range MIN-MAX (e.g. '>=500', '<10000').

engagementRate.description: Engagement rate filter using NumberValue format. Supports operators: >=N, <=N, >N, <N, N (equals), or range MIN-MAX (e.g. '>=0.03', '<0.10').

views.description: Average views filter using NumberValue format. Supports operators: >=N, <=N, >N, <N, N (equals), or range MIN-MAX (e.g. '>=1000', '<50000').

viewRate.description: View rate (views/followers) filter using NumberValue format. Supports operators: >=N, <=N, >N, <N, N (equals), or range MIN-MAX (e.g. '>=0.05', '<0.50').

growth.description: Growth filter using NumberValue format. Supports operators: >=N, <=N, >N, <N, N (equals), or range MIN-MAX.

active.description: Activity recency filter using NumberValue format. Value represents years (e.g. '>=1' means active within last 1 year). Supports operators: >=N, <=N, >N, <N, N (equals).

audienceLanguage.description: Audience language filter using StringValue format. Supports weight thresholds: 'VALUE', 'VALUE>P%', 'VALUE<P%', 'VALUE>P%<P%' (e.g. 'en>50%'). Percentages are converted to decimals.

audienceBrand.description: Audience brand affinity filter using StringValue format. Supports weight thresholds: 'VALUE', 'VALUE>P%', 'VALUE<P%', 'VALUE>P%<P%'. Percentages are converted to decimals.

audienceAge.description: Audience age filter. Supports GenderValue format: 'MM-MM gender OP value%' (e.g. '18-34 female>50%', '25-44 male>=30'), or StringValue format with weight: 'MM-MM>P%' (e.g. '13-64>0.01', '18-24>20%<80%').

audienceLookalike.description: Audience lookalike filter using StringValue format. Supports weight thresholds: 'VALUE', 'VALUE>P%', 'VALUE<P%', 'VALUE>P%<P%'. Percentages are converted to decimals.

audienceGender.description: Audience gender filter using StringValue format. Supports weight thresholds: 'VALUE', 'VALUE>P%', 'VALUE<P%', 'VALUE>P%<P%' (e.g. 'female>60%', 'male>40%<90%'). Percentages are converted to decimals.

audienceLocation.description: Audience location filter using GeoLocationValue format: '(City,Country)OP value' (e.g. '(,AS)>0.5', '(,AD)>0.5', '(Copenhagen,DK)>=0.1'). Repeat query parameter to pass multiple values.

profileLocation.description: Profile location filter using GeoLocationValue format: '(City,Country)' or '(City,Country)OP value' (e.g. '(,SE)', '(,AO)', '(Stockholm,SE)>=0.1'). Repeat query parameter to pass multiple values.

keywords.description: Content/Caption keywords to filter by. Plain string values (3+ chars). Words starting with @ or # are excluded.

mentions.description: Mentioned accounts to filter by. Plain string values without @ prefix. Combined total of mentions + hashtags cannot exceed 20.

hashtags.description: Hashtags to filter by. Plain string values without # prefix. Combined total of mentions + hashtags cannot exceed 20.

audienceRelevance.description: Audience relevance filter using StringValue format. Supports weight thresholds: 'VALUE', 'VALUE>P%', 'VALUE<P%', 'VALUE>P%<P%'. Percentages are converted to decimals.

lastPosted.description: Maximum number of days since last post. Must be >= 30 (e.g. '30', '90', '365').

followersGrowth.description: Followers growth rate filter. Plain string value.

bio.description: Free text search within creator's bio.

partnerships.description: Has sponsored posts with at least one of these brands. Plain string values.

withContact.description: Filter by contact availability (WithContactType enum). Repeat query parameter to pass multiple values.

saves.description: Average saves filter. Plain string value.

shares.description: Average shares filter. Plain string value.

tools.name: get_creator
tools.description: Retrieves a creator's profile and performance statistics including followers, average views, view rates, engagements, engagement rate, average likes, comments, shares, and saves. Looks up the creator by their social media handle and platform type. If the creator is not yet in the database but exists on a supported platform (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube), it will be discovered and saved automatically.

platform.description: Platform filter. Required if handle is used to disambiguate between platforms.

handle.description: Social media handle of the creator (e.g. @username)

server_info_crawled.name: com.getcims/mcp
